name: obsidian-liubishev-time-ledger
description: 柳比歇夫时间账本 Obsidian 插件

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir .test-build --module NodeNext --target ES2020 --moduleResolution NodeNext --skipLibCheck && node --test .test-build/tests/time.test.js .test-build/tests/stats.test.js .test-build/tests/daily-note.test.js .test-build/tests/category-suggest.test.js .test-build/tests/ai-category.test.js .test-build/tests/ai.test.js .test-build/tests/i18n.test.js
